title: Sky City
narrative: Build a city skyline! Place buildings of different heights so the view from each side matches the clues. Taller buildings block shorter ones behind them.

levels.name: Tiny Town
levels.hint: A clue of 1 means only the tallest building is visible. A clue of 3 means all 3 are visible (ascending order)!

levels.name: Small City
levels.hint: Start with clues of 1 (tallest building must be on that edge) and N (ascending order).

levels.name: Growing Up
levels.hint: Use elimination — if a clue is 1, the tallest tower MUST be in the first position from that direction.

levels.name: Metropolis
levels.hint: 5×5 — this is where it gets real. Start with the 1-clues and 5-clues, then work inward.
